_meta.source: perks/weapons: darkanddarker.wiki.spellsandguns.com/Wizard; base stats & skills: api.darkerdb.com/v1/classes (merged by scripts/build-classes.mjs)
_meta.note: Spell system (memory/casting) is out of scope for the stat engine.

name: Wizard
perk_slot_rule: 1 slot + 1 additional slot every 5 levels; 4 slots at level 15 (max)

perks.name: Arcane Feedback
perks.effect: Stacking +3% Spell Casting Speed and +3% Arcane Power Bonus per stack for 7s (max 5 stacks)

perks.name: Arcane Mastery
perks.effect: +5% Arcane Power Bonus; Arcane spell cast time -0.5s

perks.name: Fire Mastery
perks.effect: +5% Fire Power Bonus; burns last +2s and deal +2 base damage

perks.name: Ice Mastery
perks.effect: Ice damage freezes the target's feet for 0.5s

perks.name: Ice Shield
perks.effect: +20 Armor Rating while not on cooldown; melee attackers suffer frostbite (-20% Move Speed Bonus, -20% Action Speed for 0.5s)

perks.name: Melt
perks.effect: Targets suffer -15% Physical Damage Reduction and -5% Projectile Damage Reduction for 2s

perks.name: Reactive Shield
perks.effect: On taking damage: 15 Base Shield for 3s; reactivates after 12s

perks.name: Spell Overload
perks.effect: -20% Knowledge Bonus, but +60% Max Spell Count Bonus

perks.name: Staff Mastery
perks.effect: With staff-type weapons: +2 Buff Magical Damage as base damage

skills.name: Arcane Shield
skills.effect: Gain a shield around you that absorbs damage from all damage sources for seconds. When the maximum amount of absorb has been reached, the shield unleashes an Arcane Explosion, dealing magical damage to enemy targets in a 2m radius around you. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Intense Focus
skills.effect: Reduce the cast time of your next spell to seconds. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Meditation
skills.effect: Enter a meditative state and recover spells at a rate of spells costs over 24 seconds. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.effect: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.effect: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.
